name: LAPRAS MCP Server
what_it_does: Official LAPRAS MCP server enabling AI agents to access LAPRAS — Japan's developer portfolio and assessment platform — retrieving developer profile scores, activity data, technology assessments, and integrating LAPRAS's developer evaluation metrics into agent-driven HR and developer discovery workflows.
use_cases: Retrieving developer skill scores and assessments from recruitment agents
Accessing technology activity summaries from HR screening agents
Querying LAPRAS profiles for developer evaluation from talent sourcing agents
Integrating LAPRAS scoring into automated candidate evaluation agents
Fetching GitHub/Qiita/tech blog activity from developer profile agents
Building Japan-market developer discovery tools from recruiting agents
not_for: Non-Japanese market recruiting (LAPRAS focuses on Japanese tech market)
Developers without LAPRAS accounts or those not registered on platform
General social network profiles (LAPRAS is developer-specific)
best_when: A recruiter or developer tool in the Japanese tech market needs to access LAPRAS profile data programmatically — official MCP from LAPRAS Inc.
avoid_when: You're targeting non-Japanese markets or need global developer profiles — use LinkedIn, GitHub, or other platforms.

auth.notes: LAPRAS API key required. Requires LAPRAS account and API access approval. Official MCP from LAPRAS Inc.

pricing.free_tier_limits: LAPRAS basic API access for registered users
pricing.paid_tiers: LAPRAS For Business: enterprise recruitment features
pricing.notes: LAPRAS free tier for individual developers. Business/recruitment API access may require paid plan. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: LAPRAS API rate limits apply — see API documentation

known_agent_gotchas: LAPRAS API primarily documented in Japanese — English docs may be limited
Profile data availability depends on individual LAPRAS user settings/privacy
API access requires LAPRAS account — not freely accessible
Niche platform focused on Japanese tech market — limited outside Japan
Official MCP but smaller ecosystem — less community support
Business API features may require enterprise subscription
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. LAPRAS API key required — store securely as environment variable. Official MCP from LAPRAS Inc. Personal developer data — handle per LAPRAS ToS and Japanese privacy law.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Official MCP. Developer profile data — respect privacy settings.
